title: Bug: verilator sometimes fails to detect electrical short

features.name: electrical short via concatenation with submodule output
features.description: Code should include a signal driven by both direct assignment and via concatenation from a submodule output, creating an electrical short that Verilator should detect but misses

features.name: wide concatenation assignment bypasses short detection
features.description: Code should include concatenation on the left-hand side of assignment where the concatenated signal has multiple drivers, causing Verilator to fail to detect the electrical short

features.name: submodule output exceeding 32 bits used in assignment
features.description: Code should include a submodule with an output width greater than 32 bits where the output is assigned to a signal, combined with direct driving of that signal creating an electrical short
